what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that declares an attachment identifier, its channel, an attachment type, a target board item URI, and an added timestamp.
observations: Contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-19b6332b
standouts: Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a target board item
File is purely metadata with no explanatory body
conventions: Follows the att-* id prefix convention for attachments
Stores channel-memory attachment metadata as Markdown with YAML frontmatter
concerns: No content beyond identifiers; meaning depends entirely on external board item and attachment type definitions
Target URI cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A bare metadata stub that records an attachment-to-board-item association in the dragnet-development channel memory.
questions: What does the board_items attachment_type semantically represent?
What is the content or nature of board://item-19b6332b?
Why does the attachment file contain no body or payload?
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped ledger entry that associates a channel attachment with a specific board item for later lookup or audit.
novelty: The board:// URI scheme used as a target reference is distinctive compared to typical file or web links.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between an attachment identifier and a board item, which a fused system could keep as a provenance/association record.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-1ac72144 linking a dragnet-development channel attachment of type board_items to board item item-19b6332b, created 2026-06-24.
intention_for_embedding: To record and timestamp the association of a board item attachment within the dragnet-development channel memory.
